name: Arlan
desc: The head of Herta Space Station's Security Department.\nThis quiet boy hopes to protect the researchers who value their pursuit of knowledge, and to help them to complete their work.

1.name: To the Bitter End
1.desc: When HP percentage is lower than or equal to <unbreak>50%</unbreak> of Max HP, increases DMG dealt by Skill by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

2.name: Breaking Free
2.desc: Using Skill or Ultimate removes 1 <u>debuff</u> from this unit.

10000010.name: Debuff
10000010.desc: All status effects that provide negative combat debuffs, can be dispelled unless stated otherwise.

3.name: Power Through
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Turn the Tables
4.desc: When struck by a killing blow after entering battle, instead of becoming <u>knocked down</u>, Arlan immediately restores his HP to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP. This effect is automatically removed after it is triggered once or after <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s) have elapsed.

10000007.name: Downed State
10000007.desc: An ally will be incapacitated once their HP is reduced to 0.

5.name: Hammer and Tongs
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Self-Sacrifice
6.desc: When the current HP percentage drops to <unbreak>50%</unbreak> or below, Ultimate deals <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> more DMG, and the DMG multiplier for adjacent targets is raised to the same level as that for the primary target.

100801.name: Lightning Rush
100801.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Arlan's ATK to one designated enemy.
100801.simple_desc: Deals minor Lightning DMG to one enemy.

100802.name: Shackle Breaker
100802.desc: Consumes Arlan's HP equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of his Max HP to deal Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Arlan's ATK to one designated enemy. If Arlan does not have sufficient HP, his HP will be reduced to 1 after using his Skill.
100802.simple_desc: Consumes a portion of HP to deal Lightning DMG to one enemy.

100803.name: Frenzied Punishment
100803.desc: Deals Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Arlan's ATK to one designated enemy and Lightning DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Arlan's ATK to enemies adjacent to it.
100803.simple_desc: Deals massive Lightning DMG to one enemy and Lightning DMG to enemies adjacent to it.

100804.name: Pain and Anger
100804.desc: Based on Arlan's current missing HP percentage, gains DMG bonus, up to a maximum increase of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> DMG dealt by Arlan.
100804.simple_desc: Gain DMG bonus <color=#f29e38ff>based on</color> <color=#f29e38ff>currently missing HP percentage</color>.

100806.name: Attack
100806.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

100807.name: Swift Harvest
100807.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals Lightning DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Arlan's ATK to all enemies.
100807.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals minor Lightning DMG to all enemies.

1.point_desc: If the current HP percentage is <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> or lower when defeating an enemy, immediately restores HP equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of Max HP.
The chance to resist DoT Debuffs increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
Upon entering battle, if Arlan's HP percentage is less than or equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>, he can nullify all DMG received except for DoTs until he is attacked.
